concerns.detail: Use of profanity/insult '这个b' (likely shorthand for vulgar term) directed at the advisor
concerns.excerpt: (wisc也要脸；但是这个b由于pao de tai)

concerns.detail: Personal insult '舔狗' (bootlicker) characterizing the professor's relationship to Dawn Song
